channel.title: The Modern Schoolhouse
channel.description: A K-12 education blog on school choice, teaching trends, and student success

item.title: STEAM Charter Schools: Do They Deliver Real Results?
item.description: STEAM-focused charter schools are reshaping outcomes for underserved students. Here's what the research says — and what real schools are doing right.

item.title: Virtual Charter Schools Are Having a Moment
item.description: Virtual charter school enrollment is surging—and classical education is fueling the growth. Here's what families and educators need to know in 2025.

item.title: Why Early College High Schools Are Having a Moment
item.description: Early college high schools are growing fast. Here's what the research says about dual enrollment outcomes, tuition savings, and why families are choosing this model.

item.title: Why Families Are Choosing Charter Schools in Record Numbers
item.description: Charter school enrollment hit nearly 4 million in 2025. Here's what's driving the shift—and what it means for students and families.

item.title: Why More Families Are Choosing Charter Schools in 2025
item.description: Charter school enrollment hit record highs in 2025. Discover the real reasons families are choosing charters—and what it means for K-12 education.
